deep_dive.title: Streaming Video Generation with Streaming Force Control
deep_dive.abstract: We introduce StreamForce, a streaming video generation framework that enables physically grounded control through continuous force inputs. Unlike prior video models that train separate models for different force types, assume fixed forces, or rely on non-causal processing, StreamForce is a causal and unified model that responds instantly and coherently to both local and global, time-varying forces. To achieve this, we design a unified force representation as a control signal and develop a distillation pipeline for force-controllable video generation. Our model combines autoregressive efficiency with force responsiveness, sustaining stable photometric and dynamic realism. StreamForce runs at up to 16.6 FPS on a single GPU, achieving state-of-the-art performance in both force adherence and motion realism. Project website: https://neu-vi.github.io/StreamForce/
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: distillation pipeline for force-controllable video generation, achieving real-time performance
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用于力可控视频生成的蒸馏管道，实现实时性能
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 用于力可控视频生成的蒸馏管道，实现实时性能
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用于力可控视频生成的蒸馏管道，实现实时性能
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: StreamForce introduces a distillation pipeline for causal, force-controllable video generation, achieving up to 16.6 FPS with SOTA realism while maintaining physical consistency.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有视频生成模型难以支持实时、连续的力控制。StreamForce提出统一的力表示作为控制信号，并开发蒸馏管道将力响应能力融入自回归视频生成框架。模型以16.6 FPS运行，在保持光度和动态真实感的同时实现了力可控的视频流式生成，为视频生成的后训练蒸馏提供了高效方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有视频生成模型难以支持实时、连续的力控制。StreamForce提出统一的力表示作为控制信号，并开发蒸馏管道将力响应能力融入自回归视频生成框架。模型以16.6 FPS运行，在保持光度和动态真实感的同时实现了力可控的视频流式生成，为视频生成的后训练蒸馏提供了高效方案。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: distillation methods for accelerating video generation while maintaining quality

quick_skim.title: Qwen-Image-Flash: Beyond Objective Design
quick_skim.abstract: Few-step distillation has become an effective strategy for accelerating advanced visual generative models, yet prior work has largely focused on distillation objectives. In this work, we revisit few-step distillation from a complementary perspective, focusing on the training recipe that critically shapes student performance. Using Qwen-Image-2.0 as a representative case, we systematically investigate three factors in unified text-to-image generation and instruction-guided image editing distillation: data composition, teacher guidance, and task mixture. Our empirical analysis reveals several non-obvious behaviors, which motivate the development of Qwen-Image-Flash. Overall, our results suggest that effective few-step distillation requires not only carefully designed objectives, but also principled organization of the broader training pipeline.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: few-step distillation for image generation, training recipe analysis
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 面向图像生成的少步蒸馏，训练策略分析
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 面向图像生成的少步蒸馏，训练策略分析
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 面向图像生成的少步蒸馏，训练策略分析
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper revisits few-step distillation by systematically investigating data composition, teacher guidance, and task mixture in text-to-image and instruction-guided image editing, offering insights for accelerating generative models while maintaining quality.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有少步蒸馏工作多关注目标函数设计，忽略了训练策略的重要性。本文以Qwen-Image-2.0为例，系统研究了数据组成、教师指导和任务混合三个因素对蒸馏效果的影响，揭示了非直观行为，并据此开发了Qwen-Image-Flash。结果表明，有效的少步蒸馏不仅需要精心设计的目标，还需要优化训练配方。该工作为加速生成模型提供了实用指导。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有少步蒸馏工作多关注目标函数设计，忽略了训练策略的重要性。本文以Qwen-Image-2.0为例，系统研究了数据组成、教师指导和任务混合三个因素对蒸馏效果的影响，揭示了非直观行为，并据此开发了Qwen-Image-Flash。结果表明，有效的少步蒸馏不仅需要精心设计的目标，还需要优化训练配方。该工作为加速生成模型提供了实用指导。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: knowledge distillation for diversity enhancement in image generation
